badRequest.message: Something's not right in the request you made.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You are not authorized to access this page.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to access this page or perform the requested action.
forbidden.detail: This may be due to insufficient privileges or restricted access settings.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for can't be found. It may be missing or the URL is incorrect.

timeout.message: The server timed out waiting for your request. Please try again or check your connection.

serverError.title: Internal Server Error
serverError.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later or contact support if the issue persists.
